diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,147 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: Exports Hono class and select types (Env, Handler, Context, HonoRequest, client types)
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, imports from ./hono and ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
+- Plain-English summary: Main entry point for users, re-exports Hono class and selected type definitions
+- Copy-safe detail: Re-exports Hono class and type exports from types/context/request/client modules
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: Core type exports (Env, Input, RouterRoute, Handler, HandlerResponse, MiddlewareHandler, H, NotFoundResponse, NotFoundHandler, ErrorHandler, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, OnHandlerInterface)
+- Internal names noticed: BlankEnv, BlankSchema, BlankInput, Next, Bound methods/paths merging, Expand functions
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./hono-base, ./utils/headers, ./utils/types, ./router
+- Plain-English summary: Central definition module for all runtime type interfaces and types
+- Copy-safe detail: Defines Env/Handler/H/Interface types for runtime usage, excludes generic utility types
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: Exports Hono class with default router (SmartRouter with RegExp/Trie routers)
+- Internal names noticed: HonoBase import/extend, SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, HonoOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Public Hono class instantiation with default router selection and constructor
+- Copy-safe detail: Simple class extending HonoBase with optional router override in constructor
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: App methods (get/post/put/delete/options/patch/all/on/use), mount(), route(), basePath(), onError(), notFound(), fetch(), request()
+- Internal names noticed: Hono base class, compose, Context, Router, H, router instance, _basePath, #path, routes, #notFoundHandler, errorHandler
+- Imports or neighbors: ./compose, ./context, ./router, ./utils/constants, ./utils/url, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Core app router class with request dispatch, route registration, mount and utility methods
+- Copy-safe detail: Methods return/construct instance with extended types, uses internal router and compose
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: Context class with req, event, executionCtx, res, headers(), status(), get/set/var, body, text, json, html, redirect, notFound
+- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest, #rawRequest, #req, #status, #executionCtx, #res, #layout, #renderer, #notFoundHandler, #preparedHeaders, #matchResult, #path
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request, ./router, ./types, ./utils/headers, ./utils/html, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Request response context for middleware and handlers, stores state and provides response helpers
+- Copy-safe detail: Response/variable state stored in Context object, headers/status accumulate across calls
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: HonoRequest class with raw, path, param(), query(), queries(), header(), parseBody(), json(), text(), arrayBuffer(), bytes(), blob(), formData(), addValidatedData(), valid(), url, method, matchedRoutes, routePath, cloneRawRequest
+- Internal names noticed: Body, BodyCache, GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol, #validatedData, #matchResult, parseBody function
+- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./request/constants, ./router, ./types, ./utils/body, ./utils/headers, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Request wrapper providing typed access to URL, params, query params, headers, body parsing
+- Copy-safe detail: Cached body parsing prevents multiple stream consumption, uses GET_MATCH_RESULT for route matching
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol export
+- Internal names noticed: None
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request
+- Plain-English summary: Single symbol constant for getting matched route information
+- Copy-safe detail: Unique symbol for internal route tracking, no external dependencies
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: parseBody function with ParseBody type and ParseBodyOptions (all, dot options)
+- Internal names noticed: BodyData, BodyDataValue types, BodyCache, parseFormData, convertFormDataToBodyData, handleParsingAllValues, handleParsingNestedValues
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request
+- Plain-English summary: Parses request body for multipart/form-data or urlencoded with dot/all options
+- Copy-safe detail: Options control flattening/nesting behavior, handles formData or returns empty object
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: compose function
+- Internal names noticed: Context, Env, ErrorHandler, Next, NotFoundHandler, index variable, dispatch inner function
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Middleware composition and sequential execution with error/notFound handlers
+- Copy-safe detail: Array of [function, param] tuples executed in order, index tracks current position, throws on multiple next calls
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: HTTPException class with status property and getResponse() method
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPExceptionOptions, ContentfulStatusCode, res, message, cause
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: Throwable HTTP error for auth failures or validation errors with optional response
+- Copy-safe detail: Stores optional response, defaults to 500 status, can override with custom message
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: exports hc function, parseResponse, DetailedError types and exports
+- Internal names noticed: client, utils re-exports, hc, parseResponse, DetailedError
+- Imports or neighbors: ./client, ./client/utils
+- Plain-English summary: Thin wrapper exposing hc client function, parseHelper and error types
+- Copy-safe detail: Re-exports everything from ./client and ./client/utils without adding functionality
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+- Public surface: hc function, internal ClientRequestImpl class
+- Internal names noticed: createProxy, ClientRequestImpl, url, method, buildSearchParams, queryParams, pathParams, rBody, cType, ClientRequestImpl.fetch
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../types, ./utils (buildSearchParams, deepMerge, mergePath, removeIndexString, replaceUrlParam, replaceUrlProtocol)
+- Plain-English summary: Proxy-based HTTP client builder with path and method chaining, returns fetchable request objects
+- Copy-safe detail: Uses path array to track position, merges options with deepMerge, serializes body/headers/queries
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+- Public surface: BuildSearchParamsFn, ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode
+- Internal names noticed: MethodNameAll, StandardMethods, ExpandAllMethod, HonoRequest, Endpoint, ExtractSchema, ResponseFormat, BuildPath/BuildSearch/BuildTypedURL, IsLiteral, IsEmptyObject, TypedURL
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../hono-base, ./types, ./utils/http-status, ../utils/types, ../types/Endpoint
+- Plain-English summary: Client type definitions for request/response inference and path/protocol building
+- Copy-safe detail: Complex recursive types for path building and response filtering, uses Hono schema system
+
+## src/client/utils.ts
+- Public surface: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge, parseResponse
+- Internal names noticed: ObjectType, isObject, DetailedError import, FetchRP import
+- Imports or neighbors: ./fetch-result-please, ./types, ../utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: URL manipulation utilities and response parser with smart status filtering
+- Copy-safe detail: Path joining, query param building, protocol switching, removes /index, merges objects
+
+## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- Public surface: fetchRP and DetailedError class
+- Internal names noticed: nullBodyResponses set, DetailedError with public fields detail/code/statusCode/log
+- Imports or neighbors: None
+- Plain-English summary: Fetch wrapper that parses response, throws DetailedError on non-200, returns JSON or text
+- Copy-safe detail: Detects json vs text by content-type, returns data property or body, throws detailed error
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- Public surface: fire function (deprecated)
+- Internal names noticed: handle function, addEventListener('fetch')
+- Imports or neighbors: ../../hono, ../../types, ./handler
+- Plain-English summary: Registers Hono app in Service Worker, adds fetch event listener, deprecated in favor of handle
+- Copy-safe detail: Calls addEventListener with handle(app, options), sets fetch to globalThis
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- Public surface: handle function, HandleOptions type
+- Internal names noticed: Handler, FetchEvent, app.fetch, opts.fetch fallback
+- Imports or neighbors: ../../hono, ../../types, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker fetch event handler, calls app.fetch, falls back to globalThis.fetch on 404
+- Copy-safe detail: Returns async function that calls app.fetch(evt), wraps in respondWith, uses globalThis.bind
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
+- Public surface: FetchEvent and ExtendableEvent interfaces
+- Internal names noticed: clientId, handled, preloadResponse, resultingClientId, respondWith
+- Imports or neighbors: None
+- Plain-English summary: Event interfaces for Service Worker environment, exposes preload, handle results
+- Copy-safe detail: Extends Event, adds preloadResponse promise, includes response handling via respondWith
+
+## Path Inventory
+- src/index.ts
+- src/types.ts
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+- src/context.ts
+- src/request.ts
+- src/request/constants.ts
+- src/utils/body.ts
+- src/compose.ts
+- src/http-exception.ts
+- src/client/index.ts
+- src/client/client.ts
+- src/client/types.ts
+- src/client/utils.ts
+- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts

"Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."

2. Read files from a specific list
